findings.evidence: Lines 36-41 prove `(_root_.FundamentalGroup.map f a₀).range = ⊥`; lines 51-57 then prove the `mapOfEq` theorem only by rewriting with that lemma and applying `bot_le`, so any target subgroup would work.
findings.fix: State the general lemma first, e.g. `(_root_.FundamentalGroup.map f a₀).range ≤ H` for arbitrary `H : Subgroup (_root_.FundamentalGroup X (f a₀))`, and derive or omit the `mapOfEq` special case.
findings.issue: `map_range_le_mapOfEq_range_of_subsingleton` and its simply-connected wrapper specialize the codomain subgroup to `(FundamentalGroup.mapOfEq p he).range`, so the assumptions `p`, `e₀`, and `he` are stronger than the proof needs.

summary: The new fundamental-group API still exports the lifting-condition special case instead of the natural subgroup consequence of the already-proved trivial-range theorem.
